hero.title: Romania's Trusted Elevator Solutions Partner
hero.subtitle: With over 15 years of experience in Romania, we provide elevator installation, maintenance, and modernization services to the highest safety and quality standards.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Complete solutions for all your elevator needs

installation.title: Elevator Installation
installation.description: We install modern and efficient elevators for residential, commercial, and industrial buildings.

hero.title: Professional Elevator Installation Services
hero.subtitle: With 15 years of experience, we provide the most suitable elevator solutions for your buildings

overview.title: Comprehensive Installation Solutions
overview.description: We provide modern, safe and efficient elevator installation services for residential, commercial and industrial buildings. We apply the highest quality standards in every project.

steps.title: Project Assessment
steps.description: We analyze the building structure to determine the most suitable elevator type.

steps.title: Technical Planning
steps.description: We create detailed technical drawings and project planning.

steps.title: Approvals and Permits
steps.description: We obtain necessary municipal and technical approvals.

steps.title: Installation
steps.description: We perform professional installation with our certified teams.

steps.title: Testing and Commissioning
steps.description: We conduct safety tests and quality controls.

steps.title: Training and Handover
steps.description: We provide user training and documentation delivery.

items.title: Fast Installation
items.description: Projects completed within 2-4 weeks on average

items.title: Competitive Pricing
items.description: Competitive prices and flexible payment options

items.question: How long does installation take?
items.answer: It varies depending on the building type and elevator model, but typically takes 2-4 weeks on average.

items.question: What documents are required?
items.answer: Building permit, technical project and municipal approvals are required. We assist you throughout the entire process.

items.question: What is the warranty period?
items.answer: All our installations are covered by a 2-year warranty and we provide 24/7 technical support.

items.question: How can I get a price quote?
items.answer: You can get a free site visit and price quote by filling out our contact form or calling us.

maintenance.title: Periodic Maintenance
maintenance.description: Comprehensive preventive and corrective maintenance services for optimal elevator operation.

hero.title: Professional Elevator Maintenance Services
hero.subtitle: We ensure your elevators always work safely and efficiently with 24/7 technical support

overview.title: Comprehensive Maintenance Solutions
overview.description: With our preventive and corrective maintenance services, we extend the life of your elevators, increase safety and prevent unexpected breakdowns.

steps.title: Initial Inspection
steps.description: We evaluate the general condition and performance of the elevator.

steps.title: Maintenance Plan
steps.description: We create a customized maintenance program according to the elevator type.

steps.title: Periodic Checks
steps.description: We perform safety and performance checks at regular intervals.

steps.title: Emergency Response
steps.description: Our 24/7 emergency response team provides quick solutions.

steps.title: Reporting
steps.description: We provide detailed reports and recommendations after each maintenance.

items.title: Spare Parts
items.description: Original spare parts stock and fast supply

items.question: How often should maintenance be done?
items.answer: We generally recommend monthly or quarterly periodic maintenance, depending on the elevator type.

items.question: How quickly do you respond in emergencies?
items.answer: We guarantee response within 2 hours in metropolitan areas and 4 hours in other cities.

items.question: Can I make a maintenance agreement?
items.answer: Yes, we offer special price advantages and priority service with annual maintenance agreements.

items.question: Which parts are covered by maintenance?
items.answer: All mechanical and electrical parts, safety systems and control panels are covered by maintenance.

modernization.title: Modernization & Revision
modernization.description: We upgrade old elevators with state-of-the-art technology for enhanced safety and efficiency.

hero.title: Elevator Modernization Services
hero.subtitle: We update your old elevators with modern technology to provide safety, efficiency and comfort

overview.title: Modernization Solutions
overview.description: Instead of completely replacing your old elevators, we upgrade safety standards, reduce energy consumption and improve user experience through modernization.

steps.title: Technical Analysis
steps.description: We evaluate the current condition and modernization potential of the elevator.

steps.title: Solution Proposal
steps.description: We present a modernization package and price quote suitable for your needs.

steps.title: Planning
steps.description: We create a modernization plan with minimal disruption.

steps.title: Modernization
steps.description: Control system, safety equipment and energy-efficient components are updated.

steps.title: Testing and Approval
steps.description: Safety tests and official approvals are obtained.

steps.title: Handover and Training
steps.description: The updated system is delivered and user training is provided.

items.title: Energy Savings
items.description: Up to 40% reduction in energy consumption

items.title: Cost
items.description: 60-70% more economical than a new elevator

items.question: How long does modernization take?
items.answer: It varies depending on the project scope, but typically takes 1-2 weeks on average.

items.question: Can the elevator be used during modernization?
items.answer: Partial use is possible in most cases, but short-term closure may be required during some phases.

items.question: Which elevators can be modernized?
items.answer: Most elevators under 15-20 years old can be modernized. Final decision is made after technical evaluation.

items.question: Is there a warranty after modernization?
items.answer: Yes, all our modernization work is covered by a 2-year warranty.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Us
whyChooseUs.subtitle: We are more than just an elevator supplier
whyChooseUs.reason2: State-of-the-art technology and high safety standards
whyChooseUs.reason6: Extended warranty and quality after-sales service

hero.title: About AsansorTech Romania
hero.subtitle: The story of over 15 years of excellence in the elevator industry

story.title: Our Story
story.subtitle: From a local startup to the leader of the Romanian elevator market

event1.title: Company Founded
event1.description: AsansorTech Romania was established in Bucharest with a clear vision: to provide the highest quality elevator solutions.

event2.title: First Major Project
event2.description: We completed the installation of over 50 elevators in a major shopping center in Bucharest.

event3.title: National Expansion
event3.description: We opened offices in Cluj-Napoca and Timișoara, expanding our presence nationwide.

event4.title: ISO Certification
event4.description: We obtained ISO 9001:2015 certification for our quality management system.

event5.title: Over 500 Projects
event5.description: We reached the milestone of 500 successfully completed projects across the country.

event6.title: Technology Leader
event6.description: We became the leading provider of smart elevator solutions in Romania.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To provide comprehensive elevator solutions that combine supreme safety with advanced technology, ensuring efficient and comfortable mobility for all buildings in Romania.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To be recognized as the most trusted partner in the elevator industry in Eastern Europe, setting the standard for innovation, service, and operational excellence.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide us in everything we do

value1.title: Safety First
value1.description: We prioritize safety in every installation and maintenance service.

value2.title: Quality Excellence
value2.description: Commitment to the highest quality standards in all our work.

value3.title: Customer Focus
value3.description: Building long-term partnerships based on trust and transparency.

value4.title: Innovation
value4.description: Adopting cutting-edge technology to deliver superior solutions.

value5.title: Sustainability
value5.description: Environmentally responsible practices and energy-efficient solutions.

value6.title: Reliability
value6.description: 24/7 support and rapid response times for all our clients.

certifications.title: Certifications & Accreditations

certifications.description: This certification demonstrates our commitment to maintaining the highest standards of quality, safety, and professionalism in all aspects of our elevator services.
